title: The Cannon Threatens the Town
description: On pages 16–19, this part raises the stakes in Orange Town as Buggy’s weapon and crew threaten the town directly.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: little girl, you tried to make a fool of me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Darn! I'll be blown to bits!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No way! I'll never give up!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: HOW MANY PIRATES DOES IT TAKE TO HANDLE ONE GIRL?

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
